name: The Swapping Adventure
description:
Hey everyone, I have another announcement to make.

I'm working on a game and it finally reached a point where I'm confortable releasing it to the world.

The Swapping Adventure is an interactive story-driven game where every choice you make shapes the narrative. Dive into a world of body-swapping, personality-mixing, and unexpected consequences as you experiment with exchanging traits, features, and more between characters.

Choose from three distinct protagonists, each offering a unique storyline, different swapping abilities, and their own moral path to follow. Will you use your powers responsibly... or let curiosity and temptation lead you down a more chaotic route?

If you want to try it out it's currently only avaliable on my patreon (free post, don't worry) but I'm working on putting it on F95 and TFgames, as soon as it's approved on those sites I'll update the links.

Game Link

F95 link

Just to reinforce, this is not a bot alright, there's nothing to it.

(Edit its on F95 now)
